review_text: The Food is delicious, great staff.
Americanized Mexican food. Long wait.
What a Great experience.  Half way through my frozen margarita I thought I was in Mexico!
The guacamole was very tasty. Very fresh chips to match.
Just didn't seem like they knew they had it what they were supposed to be doing
owner_response: Hi Matthew, sorry for the inconvenience we will pass this message to management.

review_text: Delicious food, very nice environment and friendly staff.

Recent, very welcome changes to the Menu include new VEGAN Entre's. Happy Hour starts at 2 PM, but only offers Margarita specials for most part. They should expand to include their draft beers. Good food, Good service. I Recommend.
owner_response: Thank you for your recommendation and comments we hope to see you soon

review_text: tasty food, good service, good location.
Tried enchiladas, great value for the price, nice staff.
Nice place! The food is very tasty, and wonderful! I liked Margaritas.
Wonderful staff. They were very accommodating and the food was delicious.👌 and I must add the place was clean and followed all of covid guidelines.
Great customer service and food
Excellent food, drinks, and service. This is a bit of a drive from where we live, but it's worth it. I think we've found our new favorite Mexican restaurant!
owner_response: Thank you for your recommendation and comments we hope to see you again

review_text: Hard pass on this place.  It has all of the signs of authentic, but it's far from it.   Nothing is fresh and it's obvious.  The tortillas are from a package, the beans are from a can, the carne asada taco, dry and like its been sitting in the meat pile over the grill, all day.  The food tasted terrible, old, and like they could care less about the quality of food they serve.  Someone call Gordon Ramsey and flip this place.  The floor is so dirty it's actually slippery from the grease (slippery sign out) why not clean it instead. Rub your napkin hard enough on the sticky table and look at the dirt on it.  The owner should be ashamed.  Easy fix though, the owner just needs to give a sh*t.  Who puts chili on top of a tamale?  Ay, Dios Mío!
owner_response: Dear JP we apologize for the inconvenience on your experience we hope you can give us another chance in the future!

review_text: A little too slow service...great margaritas

Nery, Ruben, Aily and Clay are always great servers. They are consistently friendly, efficient and always make sure we have everything we need.  It’s great to see the same servers each time we come in. Getting to know the staff has been an added bonus!  Los Tres Farmington is always a favorite spot for food and drinks!!!
Nery is a great server. He always made sure our drinks were topped off. Food is delicious. Will always come back.
Thank you for the great food and service Nery!!
Nery was a sweetheart. Food was great and my drink was even better. I’ll definitely return!
Nery was very attentive!  Food was great and the 2 for $19.99 deal is amazing!
Great food, Nery our waiter was one of the best I’ve had in a while. Couldn’t ask for better service.
Had a great visit to tres los amigos  our server Nery was very attentive! Go see them!
Good food & service!
Everything was great! It's on the more expensive side, but we were aware... and willing. If we're in the area again we a WILL be back! Ordered to go.
Nery was a good waiter. He gave us all the attention we needed
Food was great and staff was friendly. Nery was our server and we had a nice lunch.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Absolutely Outstanding Experience!
I had an amazing experience at Los Tres Amigos. The Queberris taco dip and chips were fantastic, and the white queso cheese was next level — rich, creamy, and full of flavor. You can tell everything is made with care.
What really made the visit special was George, the manager. He was an absolutely amazing host — welcoming, attentive, and genuinely made sure everything was perfect. That kind of service is rare and truly appreciated.
Great food, great atmosphere, and top-tier hospitality. I’ll definitely be coming back and recommending this place to everyone!
🌮
Great food and great service! Nery was a very kind and quick waiter. 100% recommend.

Service was great. Food was great. Ailye was very attentive. All around great night with the family.

A favorite spot of our family's. We love the margaritas, quesabirrillas and enchiladas suizas. Generous portions for reasonable prices and always great service. Nery was super friendly and quick, even on a super busy evening. Appreciate the local gem!

Local atmosphere with rude wait staff.  If you do not ask 20 questions the wait staff will not tell you options for fresh versus pickled jalapenos, for example.  Please hire staff who really want to interface with customers; not just those who need money.  #how to interview.
The food was excellent with lots of choices and music just made me want to dance. We also had Great service From Nery

This place is amazing. We come here all the time. Food is so good, especially if you’re vegetarian. The black beans are fantastic. The staff is always so nice, no matter how busy they are. Come for lunch- they have lunch specials 7 days a week!

We recently moved to Farmington from Las Vegas, so finding a good Hispanic restaurant was a necessity. We found that in Tres Amigos. The food never disappoints and neither does the price. I ordered a ground beef chimichanga and they gave me shredded beef and I was already home when I noticed. I called back up to the restaurant and they said in order for me to get the order that I did order in the first place I would have to bring the order back up to them for them to do anything about it. Very poor customer service. We are frequent customers and I told them that and they still said there was nothing else they could do.

Terrible experience the male server who served me for my order a middle aged old guy with specs was an absolute disgrace. I came to this place for the first time and they put me on a table where the table was shaking and I had to put my leg on the table foot to stop it from shaking and that was not pleasant … the girls at the front of the door who receive guests like when they saw me they are like why are you here kind of expression… now coming back to the waiter / server who takes the order they guy with specs he took my order as I new to eating Mexican food it is his responsibility to tell me what is good and since I wanted to eat polo loco chicken and before that I wanted to have an appetizer I ordered thinking it is a small portion he took the order  and I flipped the page to eat polo loco chicken before ordering I asked him if it would be too much he did not understand I asked if I can eat the appetizer and polo loco he said it will be too much as the appetizer portion would be big and then I realized it was a wrong choice because it was not the one I ate in Netherlands and I wanted to eat polo loco when I said I would like to order polo loco and not the appetizer  he said he already sent the order well helooooo … what js going on here and he said I can eat polo loco some other day. I said yes I will eat but at a better place and not at this place again… then comes the appetizer I did not like it a bit and I felt it was something that was forced on to me to eat it … just ate little and rest was terrible for my pallet this could have been avoided if the guy taking the order was more kind friendly TERRIBLE EXPERIENCE…..

Nery was great!  Timeliness, excellent food, and the Modelo was chilled to.perfection.

Had to scrape it off and attempt to pick all the veggies out of the enchiladas. We eat here often and have never had this type of issue before. Very disappointed...

Very poor service. The manager and the server both messed my meal up and said they would remake and and still messed it up. If you want your meal messed up go here. Otherwise stay away.
Nery is the best!
Taco tuesdays are the best here! I really also love their guac and margaritas. My boyfriend and I come here at least twice a month and the service has always been excellent.

Definitely not what I expected for authentic Mexican Cuisine. My order was blah. Admittedly, my guest ate all of their food. We ordered two rounds of margaritas, and I probably could have had 15 rounds and still not feel tipsy. We both agreed that there appeared to be no tequila in the drinks. The server was okay, but not very welcoming. The spacing was such that they packed a lot of tables into that space so, even going to the restroom you had to twist and maneuver around seated guests.

I visited this restaurant yesterday with my daughter, and the experience was deeply disappointing from start to finish. We waited 40 minutes for two simple quesadillas while sitting on the patio. During that time, I requested water three separate times and never received it. Leaving guests outside without water is not only irresponsible but unsafe in 80+ degrees.

When I finally asked for the check, I was overheated and still had no water,  the waitress wanted to argued with me, insisting that “it had only been 40 minutes,” rather than acknowledging the issue or offering any assistance with getting my water(still no water given). She then glared at me during checkout and refused to speak to me, despite the fact that I paid my full bill and did not request any refund.

To make matters worse, when we received the quesadilla to go, it was stone cold.

This level of disregard for customer care and basic hospitality is unacceptable. I will not be returning, and I hope management takes immediate steps to address these issues so no other guests have a similar experience.
Daniel was a great server! Amazing atmosphere and wonderful food.
Nery was wonderful and very nice to my Mom and her friend. I do think the music could be lower volume. Haha

Ordered a lime margarita on the rocks and received a peach flavored margarita. The manager said that this is “how all margaritas taste.” No, no they don’t. Waited an hour plus for food.
This place is ok if you need a taco fix. Everything else is subpar. Including the service.
Do try the fajita burrito! Very yummy!
The food was great. See you next time.
Tyler M and Nery was fantastic! So was the food!
Margs are great, will be back!!
Good drinks good vibes. Daniel the waiter is pretty good🥰
Love this place. Recently remodeled and they added a nice covered patio with roll up doors!  Javier is a wonderful server making our evening very nice…

Five years since I have eaten at Los Tres Amigos. Greeted and seated immediately upon entering. Restaurant clean, renovations beautiful. Server gracious and attentive. Ordered chicken fajitas with vegetables, rice, refried beans, guacamole and flour tortillas. Generous lunch portions at fair price. Meal served hot, fresh and appetizing. Absolutely delicious. Thank you…

We had a party of 20 Saturday may 9th for my cousin bday unfortunately the beef was terrible everyone of us who ordered beef tacos or something with beef in it experienced nausea and sickness my Neice worst of them all she had two beef Barria tacos well today she is in the hospital with a stomach virus fever of 104 degrees and now a team is looking into her having GI issues something with her pancreas after eating that beef, I also read another review where a lady said after eating here she started experiencing GI problems I pray this doesn’t affect my Neice that bad she is 18 she has senior finals today and prom on the 21st what a terrible time for this to happen. The beef did taste funny me myself was nauseated that night had a headaches chills and threw up same with my Neice I only ate half taco because it tasted funny I knew something was wrong with from the first two bites…… we will be looking into a lawyer because everyone said the same thing some of us sitting ten seats down from each other and the other side of the table was sending the beef back as well and complaining. DONT EAT THE BEEF HERE!!!!!!!

If i could rate this place zero I would. Rarely do I ever take my time to write a bad review, I understand when places are busy and need that grace. Used to come here often a couple years ago and it would be decent. Today (mother’s day) I went in and placed an order for carry out for 2 tacos and a queso, to bring to my grandma. They said the estimated wait was 15 minutes, I came back 15 minutes later and was told 5 minutes. 5 minutes later, the host says another 10 minutes. At this point I was just disappointed in being told inaccurate times multiple times. After 35 minutes, I am going to be late to my grandma’s and the food is still not ready. I ask for a refund, and someone comes out to give me a refund. I express that I really wish I would have known it was a 30+ minute wait, or I would not have ordered due to time restraints. Right after this, alberto, goes “20 minutes”, as if I was lying about timing. THIS was exactly why I decided to write this review. (My receipt says 5:15pm and we left the restaurant at 5:51). Anyways…. the hosts were doing the best they could with communicating so I appreciated their help.
Excellent meal and amazing service by Daniel! We love this place and the renovations look awesome!
Nery H was great, so was the food
Nery H was an amazing server! Very kind and got everything we needed!!
Everything was excellent. Nery was excellent. Exceptional service!!!
Very was a fantastic waiter!
Nery H, was so attentive and nice! Great server!
Nery was awesome! Happy Cinco de Mayo!
I had a wonderful time on Cinco de Mayo! Nery H was the best server!
The food was delicious. Nery made sure our table had everything we needed excellent service
Nery took care of us and the food and service were awesome.
Darvin was very friendly and went above and beyond for our table! The food was delicious as well:)
Darvin is the man!! Great service and food!
Nery took excellent care of us!
Nery H is the man!  Great server!! Great food!  New patio section is really nice!
Food was wonderful and our waiter kley was top notch
NERY is amazing!!!!!!!
Nery is an Amazing server and food was amazing!
The best Mexican food around! Always delicious. Our server Kley was excellent and attentive.
Nery is the best! Best Los Tres around. Everyone at the Farmington location is wonderful, we dine there once a week at least.
Nery was great!!

Food, Drinks, and Great Conversation made for an awesome meal and great service.
Nery was an absolute pleasure. He provided excellent service that is rare.  Looking forward to coming again.

Also we love the decor upgrades!!!!
Nery is the best
Good food- quality ingredients and wide range menu well explained. Nice recent expansion with roll up doors- will be nice in the warmer season. Nery H provided great service.

False advertising—the Farmington Hills location refused to honor its own promotion. The Facebook post made today clearly states ‘Dine-In and Take-Out.’ When I attempted to place a carry-out order for the $1.99 Tuesday special, I was told it was dine-in only. This directly contradicts what was advertised.
This is misleading and unacceptable. The flyer appears to be nothing more than a tactic to draw customers in under false pretenses. I spoke with a manager who acknowledged the Facebook post but still refused to honor it. Businesses should be held accountable for the promotions they advertise.

I had a pregnancy craving for birria tacos, so we decided to order some takeout tonight (5/30). By the time we got home after picking up the food, I realized that the consommé wasn’t in the to go order. I guess I should’ve double checked the contents of the bag before leaving, but I didn’t want to tear into it yet.

I was really disappointed because the whole point was to have the rich hearty broth to dip the tacos in. (side note- I also asked for utensils but none were provided :/). That oversight bummed me out as I was hungry and didn’t want to go all the way back just to pick up that one thing.
Autumn was our server and she was so wonderful. So sweet and attentive. It was so busy too. Literally perfect service.
Our server Autumn and the food was absolutely amazing!!
Lots of empty tables and yet we were told a 35+ minute wait. No thanks! We won't be back.
Very was a good server and provided good service throughout the evening.
Good food & ambience, patio seating is very nice. Nery was a great server as well, we will be back again!
This is a really solid Mexican spot. The service is good and food is above good. It’s always quick, easy, and a good vibe.

Our best go-to place. The food and drinks Never disappoints.
The new outdoor place is amazing.
The staff and service are great.
Very good service
Very good food and service. They have a nice covered area for outdoor dining.
Tacos and combo were great
Food was incredible and very reasonable prices. Nery did an excellent job with service! We will be back
Nery was incredible, we had a group of 13 and kept adding drinks and food and everything was perfect, barely waited and nery did not skip a beat. Food was incredible, I will be back again and again
Always great good! Would like more sun on the new patio but the doors let in a good breeze.

My wife and I had a great experience here the food was high quality well made and well worth the price our server nery did a fantastic job was very attentive to our requests the drinks were fresh the food was light definitely will be coming back.

My mom and I have been coming to eat here for the past 7 years and the food NEVER disappoints. During our most recent visit, we received incredible service by our waitress Autumn who checked in on us multiple times throughout our dinner and was very kind and friendly.
Watered down margaritas and mid unseasoned tacos for which I had to wait almost 35-40 minutes.

Went last Tuesday and had Autumn as a server. She was OUTSTANDING.

We had waited 25 minutes instead of 15 so we could sit outside and then when they called us to be seated they took us to a booth inside. We mentioned wanting to sit outside and they were so weird about it. We asked how much longer we would have to wait to sit outside and the hostess said, “I don’t know. So do you want this table?”

It was really off putting. But then Autumn came to the table and turned the whole thing around! Her whole energy was great! She was attentive, but not annoying. She was knowledgeable about the menu when we asked questions. She made sure we had everything we needed. She chatted with us a perfect amount where we felt the love but not like we had an extra guest for dinner. lol. She definitely earned her tip and then some!!

I will be back and asking to be sat in Autumn’s section!

Also, the food was amazing as always! I finally tried the chipotle chimichanga and I’m in love! Please keep it around!!!
Our server Nery was very generous. We definitely will be coming back!
Atmosphere was very lively. Our server Nery was attentive and outright amazing. Will be coming back again!!

We have been to this restaurant many times. This was the first time since they renovated the outside/patio dining. May I make a suggestion: those are the wrong tables with the spaces on the tabletop for outside/patio dining, very light and wobbly. . I saw old food collected between the spindles( on the sides),  which was so gross! Also, if you drop something, it spills on your clothes because of the table top spindles and big gaps in between. It was truly gross. My husband which always enjoy coming there was totally turned completely off, when he saw all the stuck old food.  We visited on Yesterday. Thus the 3 stars.  The table was so nasty looking. I think when they wipe the table off, the person is not wiping between the spindles nor the sides, thus the wrong type of table. Should be solid top. Even the top of spindles were dirty.  Please fix this!
Nery was great!  Appreciate the attentive service!
Great service with Nery as server! Definitely will be back. Food was AMAZING!!!
Great outdoor space. Nery is very nice.
Everyone at this restaurant is always so friendly, wonderful food. We love this place. One of our favorite restaurants.
Nery is very very good. He’s da best! Numero Uno!!!!

Be8ng from Houston, Tx and knowing what authentic Mexican food taste and smells like..there is nothing authentic about this place..people of Michigan are being bamboozled with what they think authentic is. The host had horrible customer service and not welcoming (long wavy brown hair lady)..I asked for no tomatoes on my dish it was LOADED with tomatoes..smh...and they didn't apologize or even offer to make it over..AND THE CHIPS AND SALSA are store bought and not house made..would never go back...
Nery was very helpful and nice great service!

The new outside seating setup is very nice.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Add March 13 - love their seafood dishes. Today I had pescado amigo - very very good.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I went here today for the first time in many years. Had arroz con mariscos, excellent along with the margarita. Ate outside, it was pleasant.
Mel was sooo sweet I would recommend asking if she’s available!! Thank you for making us feel so special
It was difficult trying to communicate with the server who hardly spoke English
Food was mediocre at best. Reminds me Chi Chi's and you see where they are.
Nery was amazing!! The food and drinks was so delicious, would come back!
Nery was a great server! Great food and location
